code:
def linear_search_sentinel(arr, target):
    if not arr:
        return -1

    n = len(arr)
    # Store the last element of the array
    last_element = arr[n - 1]
    # Place the target as a sentinel at the end of the array
    arr[n - 1] = target

    i = 0
    # Search for the target
    while arr[i] != target:
        i += 1

    # Restore the original last element
    arr[n - 1] = last_element

    # Check if the target was found
    if i < n - 1 or arr[n - 1] == target:
        return i
    else:
        # Target was not found in the original array
        return -1
prompt: Linear Search'ü sentinel tekniğiyle optimize et.
